description_long: This is a full-size computer keyboard with a sleek, rectangular profile and a low-profile chassis. The keycaps are white and contrast sharply with the black base, while a blue accent runs along the bottom edge, adding a modern touch. The keyboard features a standard alphanumeric section, a function row, arrow keys, and a dedicated numeric keypad on the right. The surface appears smooth and hard, with clearly labeled keys in English. The branding 'Logitech' is visible on the top right corner, indicating the manufacturer. There are no visible cables or wireless receivers attached to the keyboard.
description: A full-size, white-keyed keyboard with a black base, blue accent, and visible Logitech branding. It features a numeric keypad and a modern, smooth design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the keyboard, highlighting the white keys, black base, and blue accent.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the keyboard's slim profile and the arrangement of the keys from left to right.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back edge, blue accent, and the overall length of the keyboard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the slim profile and the numeric keypad on the right.
